title: protium tonkinense
intro: Protium tonkinense, commonly known as Vietnamese rosewood or Tonkin protium, is a plant species in the family Burseraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The therapeutic actions of Protium tonkinense include its use as an anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal agent, making it beneficial for wound healing and the treatment of various infections. The bioactive constituents of Protium tonkinense include a range of compounds, including terpenoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
